Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Sages]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 9''' — Two Sages dropped their veils.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 6''' — Sages learn to control miracles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — The Sages were questioning Yerin.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 5''' — Sages focus their willpower outside of themselves to make changes to the world directly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — Sages are beings that can potentially help against Dreadgods.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Infusing techniques with willpower is not the exclusive domain of Sages and Heralds.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 21''' — Sages are peers to Eithan.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — Sages are those who embody a concept.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 3''' — Sages are powerful entities that require willpower to fight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — There were three Sages present.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
